---
title: "BA szakdolgozat"
author: "Stróbl Anita"
date: "Last compiled on `r format(Sys.time(), '%d/%m/%Y, %X %Z')`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 5
    code_folding: hide
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

options(scipen = 999)

library(psych)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(broom)
library(lavaan)
library(sjPlot)
library(car)
library(data.table)
library(tibble)
library(lubridate)
library(naniar)
library(hms)
library(skimr)
library(ggplot2)
library(janitor)
library(scales) 
library(FSA)
library(PMCMRplus)
library(lsr)
library(misty)
library(rstatix)
library(see)
library(gridExtra)

```

```{r import_dataset}

dat_1 <- read.csv("dat_1.csv")

```
